mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals monetary tightening that raises discount rates and compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 4% indicates a tight labor market that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE < 4.0, or the signal's IC drops below 0.02 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and housing starts signals strong aggregate demand that drives corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between GDPC1 and HOUST shows no significant association with SPX returns (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production indicates weak supply chain capacity that reduces corporate margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO's predictive power for 5d SPX returns is invalidated by a Rank IC below 0.03 in 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, rising inflation expectations (CPIAUCSL) drive higher real interest rates that depress equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction between CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS fails to predict SPX returns (p > 0.10) during periods when FEDFUNDS > 5.0.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in consumer spending (RSAFS) above 710 billion signals strong demand that drives corporate profits and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns show no significant correlation with RSAFS (IC < 0.02) in 3-year rolling windows despite the trigger condition.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) indicates a robust labor market that boosts consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint effect of PAYEMS and UNRATE on SPX returns is invalidated by a p-value > 0.10 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production below 102.5 signals supply-side bottlenecks that increase input costs and drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO's predictive power for 60d SPX returns is invalidated by a Rank IC below 0.03 in 2-year rolling windows.
